title: Payment not processed
description: I tried purchasing a ticket but the payment failed even though money was deducted from my account.

title: Unable to download ticket
description: After successful payment, I cannot download my ticket from the dashboard.

title: Wrong event date
description: The event date on my ticket is incorrect compared to the event page.

title: Refund not received
description: I canceled my ticket last week but haven’t received the refund yet.

title: Login issue
description: I can’t log in to my account after resetting my password.

title: Multiple charges
description: I was charged twice for the same ticket purchase.

title: Invalid promo code
description: The discount code shown on your site is not working.

title: Ticket not received by email
description: I purchased a ticket but haven’t received the confirmation email.

title: Event canceled but no update
description: The event organizer announced cancellation but I have no update on refunds.

title: Ticket transfer issue
description: I tried transferring my ticket to a friend but the system gives an error.

title: Seats not assigned
description: I bought two tickets but the seats were not assigned properly.

title: Website crash during booking
description: The site crashed while booking, and I am unsure if my payment went through.

title: Unable to change seat
description: I want to change my seat selection but the system does not allow any modifications.

title: QR code not scanning
description: The QR code on my ticket is not scanning at the event entry gate.

title: Account verification email not received
description: I signed up for a new account but did not receive the verification email.
